ast.name: textContent
ast.source: If you find this plugin valuable and would like to support its continued development, please consider buying me a coffee:
ast.target: 如果您觉得这个插件很有价值，并希望支持其持续开发，请考虑请我喝杯咖啡：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: log
ast.source: No API key provided, using fallback models
ast.target: 未提供 API 密钥，使用备用模型

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已刷新可用的 OpenAI 模型：

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 Ravenwits 的插件！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which profile to use for summarization
ast.target: 选择用于摘要生成的配置文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OpenAI API key is required to use the AI Summarize plugin.
ast.target: 使用 AI 摘要插件需要 OpenAI API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max tokens to generate the summary. Default is 1000.
ast.target: 生成摘要的最大令牌数。默认为 1000。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The AI model to use for generating the summary. Default is gpt-4.
ast.target: 用于生成摘要的 AI 模型。默认为 gpt-4。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default prompt for the AI to generate a summary.
ast.target: AI 生成摘要的默认提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where the generated summary should go
ast.target: 选择生成的摘要应放置的位置

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: You are a helpful assistant that summarizes notes...
ast.target: 你是一个能总结笔记的得力助手...

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Get your OpenAI API key from https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys
ast.target: 请从 https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys 获取您的 OpenAI API 密钥

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Some models may not stream responses and could be slower. Such as gpt-5 (use gpt-5-chat-latest instead)
ast.target: 某些模型可能不支持流式响应，速度会较慢。例如 gpt-5（请改用 gpt-5-chat-latest）

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: You can ask for a summary in bullet points or a specific style or tone. Also you can define language constraints here (e.g. 'Respond in Turkish').
ast.target: 您可以要求以要点或特定风格、语气进行摘要。您也可以在此处定义语言约束（例如“用土耳其语回答”）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Streaming aborted by SDK/user; returning partial text.
ast.target: 流已被 SDK/用户中止；返回部分文本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Streaming failed; falling back to non-streaming response.
ast.target: 流式传输失败；回退到非流式响应。

ast.name: text
ast.source: To generate a summary, select at least 30 words within a note. You can use the context menu by right-clicking on a selection and choosing "AI Summarize", or you can use the command palette and search for "AI Summarize".
ast.target: 要生成摘要，请在笔记中选择至少 30 个单词。您可以通过右键单击选中内容并选择“AI 摘要”来使用上下文菜单，也可以使用命令面板搜索“AI 摘要”。
